title: Crunchy Russian Beef Grill
description: A savory, umami-packed flank steak grilled to perfection and topped with a crisp, sweetfree panko crunch for a bold Russian-inspired dinner.
instructions: Season the flank steak on both sides with salt, pepper, garlic powder, and smoked paprika.
Heat a grill or grill pan over medium-high heat and brush with olive oil.

Place the steak on the grill and sear for 4–5 minutes per side for medium-rare, or longer to desired doneness. While the steak is resting, toast the panko in a small pan with butter, adding a pinch of smoked paprika for flavor.
Toss the shredded cabbage and carrot with a splash of olive oil, salt, and pepper, and microwave for 2 minutes or until just tender.
Slice the steak against the grain, top with the toasted panko crunch, and serve alongside the lightly sautéed cabbage and carrot salad.
